name: John James
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,592,822 for John James in U.S. House, MI-10. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,592,822.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
